title: Ofuca iPhone Charger,3Pack 6FT/1.8M iPhone Charger Cable MFi Certified Lightning Cable Fast Charging Wire Compatible with iPhone 14 13 12 11 Pro Max XS XR X 8 7 6 Plus 5 SE
features: 【Creative New construction】 Reinforced iPhone charger cable with special SR joint design that have passed 40000+ times bending tests for extra protection and durability. The solid and durable two-shade braided armor nylon shield gives the cable stronger protection and flexible performance than others and no need to worry about tangling, effectively prolong the service life.

【Perfect Compatibility】This iPhone charger cable is fully compatible with iPhone 11 Pro Max/ XS / XS Max / XR / X / 8 / 8 Plus / 7 / 7 Plus / 6s / 6s Plus /6 Plus / 6 / SE / 5s / 5c / 5, iPad Air, iPad mini, iPad, iPad Pro, iPod Nano, iPod touch as well as the latest IOS 11 12 13 system.

【2.4A Fast Charge & Sync】This iPhone charger cable supports fast charging (up to 2.4A) while preventing overheating and overcharging, ensure that you and your devices are safe, sync and charge at the same time at the fastest speeds on your windows PC or Mac.
【Perfect Length】6FT iPhone charger is great length to replace the original 3ft one, perfectly free up your charging time.

【Warranty Policy】We have 12 months of service,if you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact us. Our service team will reply you with satisfied solution within 24hours, to prove the importance we set on quality. You can purchase with confidence.
description: Incredibly Durable: The cables are composited by Nylon braided.Nylon braided jacket provides additional protection to avoid bent damage.The cables have been bent more than 40000 times and still work very well. The cables core and the multi strand copper core ensure superior data transfer with fast and stable charging. made from high-grade tinned copper. Upgraded 3D aluminum connector and exclusive laser welding technology,effectively to prevent twisting or breaking after daily tear and wear. Package Content: 3Pack 6FT/1.8M iPhone Cables Perfect Compatibility: iPhone 11,iPhone 11Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max iPhone XR ,iPhoneXS ,iPhone XS Max iPhone X/iPhone 8,iPhone 8 plus iPhone 7, iPhone 7 plus iPhone 6s, iPhone 6s plus, iPhone 6, iPhone 6 plus iPhone SE, iPhone 5s, iPhone 5, iPhone 5c iPad Pro, iPad Air, iPad Air 2 iPad mini, iPad mini 2, iPad mini 3, iPad mini 4 iPad 4th gen,iPod Touch 5th gen, iPod nano 7th Compatible with the latest ios operating system without any error messages. Service & Warranty: All products have a 12-month warranty. If you have any questions or problems, don't hesitate to contact us!
